case_title: SF RELO AGENT, INC. ET AL VS. BOUVET USA, INC ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCAN DOCUMENT). FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETERS, CRAIG
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCAN DOCUEMNT). FILED BY DEFENDANT CHOFFEL, THOMAS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SF RELO AGENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CRAIG PETERS. PLAINTIFF CRAIG PETERS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MAUREEN PETERS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CRAIG PETERS, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT BOUVET USA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESDENTED BY THOMAS CHOFFEL. DEFENDANT THOMAS CHOFFEL IS PRESENT, AND WAIVES SERVICE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506) .
ORDER JUDGMENT ISSUED ON OCT-28-2021 IS VACATED.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SF RELO AGENT, INC. PETERS, CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT BOUVET USA, INC CHOFFEL, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR CONTINUANCE ON COURT'S OWN MOTION. *** THE COURT GRANTS ZOOM AUTHORIZATION FOR THE NOV-2-2021 HEARING*** HEARING SET FOR NOV-02-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN TO NOV-15-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE COURT'S PRIOR JUDGMENT ISSUED ON OCT-28-2021 IS VACATED. JUDGE TONG RECUSES HERSELF FROM HEARING THIS MATTER. DEFENDANT MAY APPEAR BY ZOOM. PLAINTIFF CRAIG PETERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THOMAS CHOFFELL IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF RELO AGENT, INC. PETERS, CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUVET USA, INC $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,075.00, CASE AGAINST THOMAS CHOFFEL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY SF RELO AGENT, INC. PETERS, CRAIG BOUVET USA, INC CHOFFEL, THOMAS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-15-2021 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-15-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF SF RELO AGENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY CRAIG PETERS, OWNER. DEFENDANT BOUVET USA, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THOMAS CHOFFEL, MANAGER. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. PRO TEM JUDGE: PANG LY; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF RELO AGENT, INC. PETERS, CRAIG PETERS, MAUREEN DEBOER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOUVET USA, INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, DEFENDANT BOUVET USA INC. SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF'S $7,500.00 FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE AND ADDITIONAL EXPENSES, INLCLUDING $75.00 FOR COURT COSTS. DEFENDANT THOMAS CHOFFEL WAS ACTING AS BOUVET'S EMPLOYEE SO THE CASE AGAINST HIM INDIVIDUALLY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
